# FreeLLM

> FreeLLM is a free, open source desktop app that runs the world's best AI language models 100% locally on your computer. Your data never leaves your machine.

## What is FreeLLM?

FreeLLM is a Mac and Windows desktop application that lets anyone run powerful AI models locally — for free, forever. It works as a drop-in replacement for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini APIs. No subscriptions, no cloud, no data sharing.

## Key Facts

- Free forever. No credit card. No subscription.
- Runs 100% on your computer — no data sent to any server, ever
- Supports Llama 3.3 (Meta), Qwen 2.5 (Alibaba), DeepSeek R1, Gemma 2 (Google), and more
- Auto-detects your hardware and recommends the best model
- Generates a public HTTPS URL via Cloudflare so your AI is accessible from any device or app
- OpenAI-compatible API — works with LangChain, Cursor, Continue.dev, n8n, Zapier, AutoGen
- Voice input via Web Speech API
- Image and file attachment support (vision models: llava, moondream)
- Drop-in replacement: change two lines of code (base_url + api_key)
- MIT licensed, fully open source

## Download

- Mac: https://github.com/spideysense/OpenLLM/releases/latest/download/FreeLLM-mac.dmg
- Windows: https://github.com/spideysense/OpenLLM/releases/latest/download/FreeLLM-win.exe
- Source: https://github.com/spideysense/OpenLLM

## Pricing

- Free (local): $0/month forever — run on your own hardware
- Cloud: $0.99/month — we host it, works when your computer is off
- Pro: $1.99/month — priority cloud, email support

## How It Works

1. Download FreeLLM for Mac or Windows
2. Open the app — it auto-detects your hardware and recommends a model
3. Click "Get Model" — downloads and installs in the background
4. Start chatting — your AI runs entirely on your machine
5. Use the public Cloudflare URL from any device or plug into Cursor, Zapier, etc.

## Privacy

FreeLLM collects zero data. No telemetry. No analytics. No usage tracking. Your conversations are stored only on your local machine and are never transmitted anywhere. The only network traffic is: (1) downloading models from Ollama's registry, (2) Cloudflare tunnel routing for the public URL (encrypted, no storage), and (3) update checks against GitHub releases.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is FreeLLM really free?** Yes. The local version is free forever. You run models on your own hardware with no cost.

**What hardware do I need?** Any Mac or Windows PC with 8GB+ RAM. 16GB recommended. Apple Silicon Macs and NVIDIA GPU PCs get the best performance.

**Does my data stay private?** Yes, 100%. Nothing ever leaves your machine when using the local version.

**Can I use it in my apps?** Yes. FreeLLM exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on localhost:4000 and a public HTTPS URL. Change two lines of code in any OpenAI SDK integration.

**What models does it support?** Llama 3.3 (70B), Qwen 2.5 (7B/32B), DeepSeek R1, Gemma 2, Qwen Coder, and many more via Ollama's model library.

**Does it work offline?** Yes, once a model is downloaded. No internet required for inference.

## Contact

Website: https://open-llm-ten.vercel.app
GitHub: https://github.com/spideysense/OpenLLM
